hooks.name: cli-validation
hooks.description: Validates Goldsky CLI commands and blocks invalid subcommands (like 'turbo stop') with helpful suggestions

hooks.name: pre-deploy-validate
hooks.description: Validates pipeline YAML before deploying with goldsky turbo apply

hooks.name: secret-check
hooks.description: Verifies that all secret_name references in pipeline YAML exist before deploying

hooks.name: post-deploy-inspect
hooks.description: Suggests running goldsky turbo inspect after a successful pipeline deploy
